text_block_list.name: Book-Loving Umamusume
text_block_list.text: ...Here you go.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Oh, are you here to return these? Hehe. I had a
feeling you would be dropping by soon!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: That's all eighteen volumes of The Scarlet King's War and Knight of the Red Rose, then! Since they're set in the same world, it's hard not to binge read them all at once, huh?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Oh, by the way, the books you requested came
in. They're on the new arrivals shelf if you're—

text_block_list.name: Book-Loving Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Thank you, but I'm fine for today!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Oh, okay...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tryouts are being held today, and I happen to
spot Zenno Rob Roy among the crowd. She looks
extremely focused.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: You can do it! You're almost there!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her words of support are as fervent as they are
quiet. The racer she's rooting for is doing her best
sprinting down the last stretch, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: ...She took ninth.
choice_data_list: Is that a friend of yours?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Huh? Um, well...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't go so far as to say that... She's just a
kindred spirit who used to like reading.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I'm puzzling over her use of the past tense, the
racer she was cheering for walks by us.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Ah...
choice_data_list: Aren't you going to say something to her?
Aren't you going to say something to her?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I-I want to, but... I don't know if I'd be able to
cheer her up...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Zenno Rob Roy doesn't seem confident enough to
reach out, but it's clear how much she cares about
the unlucky racer.
choice_data_list:
I'm sure you can muster up the courage for a
friend!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Muster up my courage... Yes, you're right. This is
no time to be a coward!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: I'll... I'll be right back!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Excuse me!

text_block_list.name: Book-Loving Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Rob Roy... Did you come to see the race?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Yes! Sorry for bothering you. It's just, I was
worried since I haven't seen you in the library
lately...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
But it makes sense now that I know you were
preparing for tryouts. Um, maybe I'll see you
there again once things settle down...

text_block_list.name: Book-Loving Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Thanks... But I'm not going back to the library. I
realized something.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: H-huh?

text_block_list.name: Book-Loving Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
While everyone else was busy improving with
their rivals or making friends they can train with,
all I did was bury my nose in books.

text_block_list.name: Book-Loving Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
If I want to be a serious racer, I should've been
committing myself to running like everyone else!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: That... That's not true at all!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Sorry. I didn't mean to yell, but... I can't agree
with what you just said.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
It's true that the time we spend reading is time
that we could have used to get closer to people
or learn new things.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
But there's a lot to be gained from reading books
too! Experiences that only book lovers like us can
have!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
And your love of books can also lead to new
friendships...

text_block_list.name: Book-Loving Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
U-um, sorry if I'm bothering you, but I wanted to
say that I really love that book too!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Ah, it's okay! You don't have to apologize. I was
actually just thinking that I wanted to talk to
someone about it!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
"My friends and brave warriors. Fear not, for if
ever you find yourself in dire straits, I shall fly to
your side without delay."

text_block_list.name: Book-Loving Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
That's a quote from the first book we talked
about together...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Our mutual love of reading led to us becoming
friends, so please let me help you. What would
you say to some partner running with me?

text_block_list.name: Book-Loving Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Oh, Rob Roy... Thank you! I would love that!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Zenno Rob Roy and her friend start running down
the track. They both look serious, but with
unmistakably happy smiles.
